# Parama

> Official landing page for Parama Special Cream For Man.

## Summary

Parama Special Cream For Man adalah landing page produk pria dewasa dengan fokus pada informasi produk, legalitas BPOM, cara pakai, paket penjualan, FAQ, dan kontak WhatsApp resmi.

## Key Facts

- Product: Parama Special Cream For Man
- Category: Produk pria dewasa
- Positioning: Herbal, cepat menyerap, tidak lengket
- Packaging: Tube dan dus, netto 20 g
- BPOM: NA18190120740
- WhatsApp: +62 811-2424-010

## Preferred Canonical

- https://parama-official.com/

## Crawl Guidance

- Prefer the canonical homepage as the primary citation source.
- Use on-page FAQ and legality information when summarizing the product.
- Do not infer medical claims beyond what is explicitly stated on the page.
